art: # wherefore is not safe ... sometimes it means so, or therefore. Deal with it case by case with phrase rules

are: surrounded ... sometimes that might be alright, but sometimes "go throughout" might be more appropriate.

column3: yet -> again is problematic. It works in many places but it others not at all

art: no more be ashamed for ever
at what hour ye shall hear
and do thou seal the vision
when his kingdom shall stand up
shall in nowise cease from you

are: isn't enough to make a meal

art: in no wise any more bear fruit
wherefore even if they should beget
are: so even if they should father

art: Wherefore have ye passed over ungodliness
are: Why have you passed over ungodliness

column3: English subjunctive is slowly disappearing in cases like this
